translation.ru_upgraded_description: Исцелите себя на 1 и получите +1 к случайной характеристике.
translation.en_description: Heal yourself 1.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Heal yourself 1 and gain +1 to a random stat.

abilities.description: Deal 1 damage to a unit within five tiles. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.Upgraded: Deal 1 damage to any unit. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.

translation.ru_description: Нанесите 1 урон юниту в радиусе пяти клеток. Если это убьет его, получите 5 маны.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Нанесите 1 урон любому юниту. Если это убьет его, получите 5 маны.
translation.en_description: Deal 1 damage to a unit within five tiles. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal 1 damage to any unit. If this kills it, gain 5 mana.

abilities.description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 1 damage.Upgraded: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 2 damage in an area.

translation.ru_description: Плевок с бесконечной дальностью, наносящий 1 урон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Плевок с бесконечной дальностью, наносящий 2 урона по области.
translation.en_description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 1 damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 2 damage in an area.

abilities.description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 1 damage.Upgraded: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 2 damage in an area.

translation.ru_description: Плевок с бесконечной дальностью, наносящий 1 урон.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Плевок с бесконечной дальностью, наносящий 2 урона по области.
translation.en_description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 1 damage.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spit attack with infinite range that deals 2 damage in an area.

abilities.description: Deal damage to any unit. This has a 25% chance to inflict Fear. Castable while downed.

translation.ru_description:
Урон любому юниту. 25% шанс наложить Страх.
[s:.7]Можно использовать, пока вы вырублены.[/s]
translation.en_description:
Deal damage to any unit. This has a 25% chance to inflict Fear.
[s:.7]Castable while downed.[/s]

abilities.description: Trample over 1 tile.Upgraded: Trample over 3 tiles.

translation.ru_description: Растопчите врага, проходя через 1 клетку.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Растопчите врагов, проходя через 3 клетки.
translation.en_description: Trample over 1 tile.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Trample over 3 tiles.

abilities.description: Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit. (Castable once per battle.) Upgraded: Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit. (This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)

translation.ru_description:
Швырните камень в юнита, накладывая Оглушение.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за битву.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Швырните камень в юнита, накладывая Оглушение.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит 0 маны. Можно использовать раз за битву.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Chuck a rock at a unit, inflicting Stun on that unit.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana. Castable once per battle.)[/s]

abilities.description: Throw your weapon at a unit. The weapon breaks. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Бросьте свое оружие в юнита. Оружие ломается.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Throw your weapon at a unit. The weapon breaks.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

abilities.description: Dash forward and light fires in your path.

translation.ru_description: Рывок вперед, поджигающий путь.
translation.en_description: Dash forward and light fires in your path.

abilities.description: Explode the nuke and mass damage everything.
Spend 5 coins, heal 10 HP. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Spend 5 coins, heal 15 HP. (Castable once per turn.)

Потратьте 5 монет, восстановите 10 ОЗ.
[s:.7](Можно использовать раз за ход.)[/s]

abilities.description: Shoot a wet hairball that deals damage in an area.Upgraded: Shoot a wet hairball that deals more damage in an area.

translation.ru_description: Выплюньте мокрый комок, наносящий урон по области.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Выплюньте мокрый комок, наносящий больше урона по области.
translation.en_description: Shoot a wet hairball that deals damage in an area.

abilities.description: Deal 1 electric damage at infinite range.Upgraded: Deal 1 electric damage with a 25% chance to Stun at infinite range.
